title: Small Casserole Dish with Lid, 0.65L 15cm, Individual Glass Casserole for One, Microwaveable, Oven Proof
features: 【Small 0.65L Personal Size】Bowl Measures internally Φ15xH5cm. Overall Casserole LxWxH (&handles&lid): 18x16x8cm. Perfect for individuals living alone to makes or reheat meals in single servings or helps to monitor portions
【Perfect for Food Safety】Nothing but glass, no worries about chemicals, teflon, cook and eat healthy!
【Oven to Table to Fridge】Cook, Serve, Store and Reheat all in one casserole dish and minimises washing-up
【Stackable for Space Saving】With the flat top and tilt glass bowl, the casserole dishes are stackable. Suit for dorms or small locker
【Versatile Lid】With glass lid, you can made any casserole you want without worrying about spills, turn the lid over you can use it as a small baking dish or side dish
【Ideal Gift 】A perfect gift for someone who makes meals in single servings
description: Product Description Tempered glass ovenware can withstand temperatures from -20℃ to 250℃, which ensures the small casserole can be used to stew/roast in oven/microwave. After taking it out of the oven, please put it at room temperature before putting it in the refrigerator The casserole is for the oven or the microwave only. Do NOT heat with open fire. Can not be used on electric hot plate/hob They are freezer and oven proof, but not freezer-to-oven. Round Casserole with an actual Glass Lid by karadrova 100% Made of Tempered Glass - Oven/Microwave Proof There are four sizes of 0.65L 1L 1.5L 2.5L to meet the needs of different people. Whether you are living alone, a family of 2-5, or those who want to monitor your portions, you can find the perfect size casserole The casserole has a wide range of uses, is ideal for making casserole, stew and cook rice in the microwave. Meanwhile it also ideal for roasts, shepherds pie Refrigerator, dishwasher, oven, microwave safe Please use protective gloves when taking it out of the microwave/oven. After taking it out, do not touch wet or cold objects immediately Non-porous Bottom - Ensure Original Taste of Food The smooth and non-porous bottom of the bowl ensures that the food retains its own taste and enhances the eating experience Smooth Surface - Easy to Clean Once finished cooking allow to soak for easy cleaning. You can also use a scourer for any dried or baked on residue. You can also put it in the dishwasher, and if anything sticks on, just scour it off Stackable Casserole - Easy to store It’s easy to stack when not in use, if you don’t have a lot of storage space for dishes and containers they’re perfect because you can use the lids as serving dishes too so they will work well for dorms, etc Handles are Easy to Grasp and Move With the handles both glass casserole and lid are easy to grip. You can easily move the casserole to the table. Turn the lid over and you can also use it as a small tray for casserole without any worries of damaging the table Versatile Casserole - Ideal for Making Bread When making sourdough it’s important to have an environment that can allow the bread to rise and keep moisture, as well as allowing the rise to not be compressed but still direct shaping of the bread. This dish covers all of those based well! Four Sizes are Available 0.65L/1L are perfect size for heating up single servings, good for storing/ freezing leftovers or individual portions. 1.5L is a good size for making a casserole for two or heating things in the microwave 2.5L is ideal for 3-5 people Rectangle Casserole Dishes Square Casserole Dish Set of 3 Casserole Dish Set of 4 Glass Baking Dishes with Lids Set of 4 Baking Dish Cast Iron Casserole Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 641 4.5 out of 5 stars 387 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,413 4.3 out of 5 stars 316 4.3 out of 5 stars 316 4.5 out of 5 stars 213 Price £14.99 £ 14 . 99 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 £27.99 £ 27 . 99 — no data — no data — no data Material Tempered glass Tempered glass Tempered glass Tempered glass & Plastic lid Tempered glass Cast Iron Sizes for available 1L, 1.5L, 2L 1L, 1.5L, 2L 0.65+1+1.4L 0.8+1.4+2.2+3.5L 0.9+1.4+2.2+3.4L 3L Ovenproof ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Microwaveable ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ no data Hob & Stove no data no data no data no data no data ✓
